'''Chla C'cHaan''',<ref name="University" /> also known as '''Chal Haan''',<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|4|Chal Haan (Chla C'cHaan)}}</ref> was a [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] who led a number of his [[Species/Legends|species]] in [[Colonist/Legends|colonizing]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Neimoidia/Legends|Neimoidia]]<ref name="University" /> around [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> C'cHaan kept a series of writings that detailed the colony's fall from grace in Duros culture,<ref name="University" /> and in one of those writings—his ''[[Encyclical on Historical Greatness]]''—he called upon the colonists to embrace the heritage of their original [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. The descendants of the colony that C'cHaan founded eventually evolved into a separate species known as the [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidians]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Chla C'cHaan was first mentioned in ''[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Duros]]'', an article released in [[2000]] as part of the [[Star Wars Gamer 2|second issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine,<ref name="University" /> and he received an entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''—but under the simplified name Chal Haan.<ref name="CSWE" /> He also received a mention in the Codex entry for the Neimoidian species in the [[2011]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', which referred to him as Chal Haan.<ref name="Codex">{{TORcite|type=codex|Neimoidian}}</ref>
